---
title: "safebiome audit report"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    df_print: paged
params:
  audit: NULL
  report_data: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8.8,
  fig.height = 5.2,
  dpi = 120
)

audit <- params$audit
report_data <- params$report_data

field_value <- function(x, field) {
  value <- x$value[x$field == field]
  if (length(value) == 0 || is.na(value[[1]]) || !nzchar(value[[1]])) {
    return("Not supplied")
  }
  value[[1]]
}

safe_table <- function(x, caption = NULL) {
  if (!is.data.frame(x) || nrow(x) == 0) {
    cat("No data available.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  table <- knitr::kable(
    x,
    caption = caption,
    format = "html",
    table.attr = 'class="report-table"'
  )
  knitr::asis_output(paste0('<div class="table-scroll">', table, '</div>'))
}

safe_plot <- function(expr) {
  tryCatch(
    print(expr),
    error = function(error) {
      cat("*Plot unavailable:* ", conditionMessage(error), "\n", sep = "")
    }
  )
}
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --sb-ink: #1f2328;
  --sb-muted: #667085;
  --sb-line: #d9dee5;
  --sb-panel: #ffffff;
  --sb-bg: #f6f8fb;
  --sb-blue: #246bfe;
  --sb-green: #009e73;
  --sb-amber: #e69f00;
  --sb-orange: #d55e00;
  --sb-red: #cc3311;
}

body {
  background: var(--sb-bg);
  color: var(--sb-ink);
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 1160px !important;
  margin: 28px auto 56px auto;
  padding: 0 24px 42px 24px;
  background: transparent;
}

h1.title {
  margin: 0 0 18px 0;
  font-weight: 760;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  margin-top: 34px;
  padding-bottom: 8px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  font-size: 1.55rem;
}

h2 {
  margin-top: 26px;
  font-size: 1.18rem;
}

#TOC {
  margin: 18px 0 26px 0;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  border: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--sb-panel);
}

.report-hero {
  margin: 18px 0 28px 0;
  padding: 22px;
  border: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--sb-panel);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(31, 35, 40, 0.06);
}

.report-hero-top {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.report-kicker {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--sb-muted);
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.report-title {
  margin: 2px 0 0 0;
  font-size: 1.7rem;
  font-weight: 760;
}

.risk-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: white;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.risk-low { background: var(--sb-green); }
.risk-moderate { background: var(--sb-amber); }
.risk-high { background: var(--sb-orange); }
.risk-critical { background: var(--sb-red); }
.risk-unknown { background: #8b949e; }

.metric-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}

.metric {
  padding: 14px;
  border: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fbfcfe;
}

.metric-label {
  color: var(--sb-muted);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
}

.metric-value {
  margin-top: 4px;
  font-size: 1.28rem;
  font-weight: 720;
}

.table-scroll {
  width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin: 12px 0 20px 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--sb-panel);
}

.report-table {
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 !important;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.report-table th {
  background: #eef3fb;
  color: #2f3437;
  font-weight: 700;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.report-table th,
.report-table td {
  padding: 9px 11px !important;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--sb-line) !important;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.report-table caption {
  padding: 9px 11px;
  color: var(--sb-muted);
  text-align: left;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  background: white;
}

pre {
  border: 1px solid var(--sb-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
}

ul {
  padding-left: 1.25rem;
}
</style>
```

```{r report-hero, results='asis'}
risk <- tolower(audit$risk)
risk_class <- if (risk %in% c("low", "moderate", "high", "critical")) risk else "unknown"
cat(
  '<div class="report-hero">',
  '<div class="report-hero-top">',
  '<div><p class="report-kicker">safebiome audit</p>',
  '<p class="report-title">Microbiome design risk report</p></div>',
  '<span class="risk-badge risk-', risk_class, '">', toupper(audit$risk), '</span>',
  '</div>',
  '<div class="metric-grid">',
  '<div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Samples</div><div class="metric-value">', field_value(report_data$dataset, "Samples"), '</div></div>',
  '<div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Features</div><div class="metric-value">', field_value(report_data$dataset, "Features"), '</div></div>',
  '<div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Outcome</div><div class="metric-value">', field_value(report_data$dataset, "Outcome"), '</div></div>',
  '<div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">Batch variables</div><div class="metric-value">', field_value(report_data$dataset, "Batch variables"), '</div></div>',
  '</div>',
  '</div>',
  sep = ""
)
```

# Dataset summary

```{r dataset-summary}
safe_table(report_data$dataset)
```

# Risk summary

Overall risk: `r toupper(audit$risk)`

```{r risk-summary-table}
safe_table(report_data$risk)
```

```{r risk-dashboard, fig.alt="Module-level safebiome risk dashboard"}
safe_plot(ggplot2::autoplot(audit))
```

# Design audit

```{r design-audit-table}
safe_table(report_data$design)
```

```{r design-audit-plot, fig.alt="Outcome distribution across the selected design variable"}
safe_plot(safebiome::plot_design(audit))
```

# Correction feasibility

```{r correction-feasibility-table}
safe_table(report_data$correction)
```

# Microbiome batch audit

```{r batch-audit-table}
safe_table(report_data$batch)
```

```{r variance-plot, fig.alt="PERMANOVA variance explained by audit terms"}
safe_plot(safebiome::plot_variance(audit, distance = "all"))
```

```{r ordination-plot, fig.alt="PCoA ordination colored by the default audit variable", fig.height=4.9}
safe_plot(safebiome::plot_ordination(audit, distance = "all"))
```

# Leakage audit

```{r leakage-audit-table}
safe_table(report_data$leakage)
```

# Recommendations

```{r recommendations}
if (length(report_data$recommendations) == 0) {
  cat("No recommendations were recorded for this audit.\n")
} else {
  for (recommendation in report_data$recommendations) {
    cat("- ", recommendation, "\n", sep = "")
  }
}
```

## Suggested analysis plan

```{r analysis-plan}
plan <- report_data$plan
safe_table(data.frame(
  component = c(
    "Differential abundance formula",
    "PERMANOVA formula",
    "Permutation scheme",
    "Batch strategy",
    "ML validation"
  ),
  value = c(
    plan$da_formula$display,
    plan$permanova_formula$display,
    plan$permutation$scheme,
    plan$batch_strategy$strategy,
    plan$ml_validation$scheme
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
))
```

# Session info

```{r session-info}
utils::sessionInfo()
```
